     The Numbers Business Report

A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $72,110,659Details
International Box Office $55,599,891
Worldwide Box Office $127,710,550
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,805,650
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,657,095
Total $12,462,745
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Three under-appreciated and over-burdened women rebel against the challenges and expectations of the Super Bowl for moms: Christmas. And if creating a more perfect holiday for their families wasn’t hard enough, they have to do all of that while hosting and entertaining their own mothers. By the end of the journey, our moms will redefine how to make the holidays special for all and discover a closer relationship with their mothers.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,759,161 (23.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$28,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,615 opening theaters/3,615 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $96,143,055

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 1st, 2017 (Wide) by STX Entertainment
International Releases: November 3rd, 2017 (Wide), released as Bad Moms 2 (New Zealand)
November 3rd, 2017 (Wide), released as Bad Moms 2 (Australia)
November 3rd, 2017 (Wide), released as Blogos Mamos ir jų Kalėdos (Lithuania)
November 3rd, 2017 (Wide) (Poland)
November 3rd, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: January 23rd, 2018 by STX Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude sexual content and language throughout, and some drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2493 (Cert #51233), 9/13/2017)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Franchise: Bad Moms
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Prologue, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Dysfunctional Family, Gambling, Generational Conflict, Money Troubles, Non-Chronological, Widow/Widower
Release detail: Christmas in November
Social setting: Christmas, Strippers / Stripping
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Huayi Brothers Pictures Ltd
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Three under-appreciated and over-burdened women rebel against the challenges and expectations of the Super Bowl for moms: Christmas. And if creating a more perfect holiday for their families wasn’t hard enough, they have to do all of that while hosting and entertaining their own mothers. By the end of the journey, our moms will redefine how to make the holidays special for all and discover a closer relationship with their mothers.
